name: Carrot Muffins with Walnut-Cream Centers
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Orange juice concentrate (no sugar added)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin pan with paper liners and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, 1/3 cup sugar, and baking soda.
4. Add raisins; stir until combined.
5. Stir in margarine until just mixed.
6. In another bowl, combine buttermilk, egg substitute, orange juice concentrate, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
7. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
8. Gently fold in walnuts and sour cream.
9. Divide batter among muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the pan to a wire rack and let cool completely.
